description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:latest Docker image. Add a pages job (in the deploy stage) that runs the command 'hugo', publishes the generated public/ directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch via an only rule to deploy the site to GitLab Pages. Add a test job (in the test stage) that also runs 'hugo' but is excluded from the master branch using an except rule, allowing the build to be validated on feature branches. No services, caches, or additional variables are required.
